heroTitle: The exam has a shape. Learn the shape.
heroSub: Every Intro to Statistics final follows the same template: a true/false claims battery plus computational questions on estimation, testing, and comparing groups. Built from your course's written summary, the lecture slides, and all 19 past finals (2012–2025) — translated, tagged, and drillable.
examFormatLine: 3 hours · calculator + two double-sided formula pages · usually 4 questions

slotRoles.Estimation: weeks 5–6 · estimate with a margin of error

askSuggestions: when is the Wilson interval better than Wald?
power of a one-sided Z test
chi-square vs Fisher exact for a 2x2 table
does the odds ratio appear in exam solutions?
method of moments for a uniform distribution
